sentences.target: La tierra está mojada después de la lluvia.
sentences.reading: /la ˈtje.ra esˈta moˈxa.ða desˈpweθ de la ˈʝu.βja/

translations.es: La tierra está mojada después de la lluvia.
translations.ipa: /la ˈtje.ra esˈta moˈxa.ða desˈpweθ de la ˈʝu.βja/
translations.en: The ground is wet after the rain.
translations.fr: Le sol est mouillé après la pluie.
translations.de: Der Boden ist nach dem Regen nass.
translations.it: Il terreno è bagnato dopo la pioggia.
translations.ko: 땅은 비가 온 뒤에 젖어 있습니다.
translations.pt: O chão está molhado depois da chuva.
translations.vi: Mặt đất ướt sau cơn mưa.
translations.nl: De grond is nat na de regen.
translations.hu: A föld nedves az eső után.
translations.hi: बारिश के बाद ज़मीन गीली है।
translations.el: Το έδαφος είναι βρεγμένο μετά τη βροχή.
translations.ja: 雨の後、地面は濡れています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, modifying the noun that follows.
Common noun, feminine singular; refers to soil/ground.
Auxiliary/copular verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Adjective, feminine singular, agreeing with "tierra".
Adverb indicating time.
Preposition introducing the complement "la lluvia".
Definite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition "de".

sentences.target: Mi hijo juega en la tierra del jardín.
sentences.reading: /mi ˈi.xo ˈxwe.ɣa en la ˈtje.ra del xarˈðin/

translations.es: Mi hijo juega en la tierra del jardín.
translations.ipa: /mi ˈi.xo ˈxwe.ɣa en la ˈtje.ra del xarˈðin/
translations.en: My son is playing in the garden dirt.
translations.fr: Mon fils joue dans la terre du jardin.
translations.de: Mein Sohn spielt in der Gartenerde.
translations.it: Mio figlio gioca nella terra del giardino.
translations.ko: 제 아들이 정원 흙에서 놀고 있습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我儿子在花园的泥土里玩。
translations.yue: 我個仔喺花園泥土度玩。
translations.ru: Мой сын играет в садовой земле.
translations.pt: Meu filho brinca na terra do jardim.
translations.vi: Con trai tôi đang chơi trong đất vườn.
translations.nl: Mijn zoon speelt in de tuinaarde.
translations.uk: Мій син грається в садовій землі.
translations.hu: A fiam a kerti földben játszik.
translations.hi: मेरा बेटा बगीचे की मिट्टी में खेल रहा है।
translations.pl: Mój syn bawi się w ogrodowej ziemi.
translations.el: Ο γιος μου παίζει στο χώμα του κήπου.
translations.id: Anak laki-laki saya bermain di tanah kebun.
translations.ro: Fiul meu se joacă în pământul din grădină.
translations.cs: Můj syn si hraje v zahradní hlíně.
translations.ja: 息子は庭の土で遊んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, invariant in gender and number, modifying "hijo".
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition "en".
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition within "del jardín".

sentences.target: Puse la planta en tierra nueva.

translations.es: Puse la planta en tierra nueva.
translations.en: I put the plant in new soil.
translations.fr: J’ai mis la plante dans une nouvelle terre.
translations.de: Ich habe die Pflanze in neue Erde gesetzt.
translations.it: Ho messo la pianta in новой?
translations.ko: 저는 식물을 새 흙에 옮겨 심었습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把植物种进了新土里。
translations.ru: Я посадил растение в новую землю.
translations.pt: Coloquei a planta em terra nova.
translations.vi: Tôi đã đặt cây vào đất mới.
translations.nl: Ik heb de plant in nieuwe aarde gezet.
translations.uk: Я посадив рослину в нову землю.
translations.hi: मैंने पौधे को नई मिट्टी में लगाया।
translations.el: Έβαλα το φυτό σε καινούριο χώμα.
translations.nb: Jeg satte planten i ny jord.
translations.id: Saya menaruh tanaman itu di tanah baru.
translations.sv: Jag satte växten i ny jord.
translations.ro: Am pus planta în pământ nou.
translations.cs: Dal jsem rostlinu do nové zeminy.
translations.da: Jeg satte planten i ny jord.
translations.ja: 私はその植物を新しい土に植えました。

tokens.explanation: Main verb in preterite indicative, 1st person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of "puse".
Preposition introducing the locative/complement phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition "en".
Adjective, feminine singular, agreeing with "tierra".

sentences.target: Quita la tierra de tus zapatos.

translations.es: Quita la tierra de tus zapatos.
translations.en: Take the dirt off your shoes.
translations.fr: Enlève la terre de tes chaussures.
translations.de: Entferne den Dreck von deinen Schuhen.
translations.it: Togli la terra dalle tue scarpe.
translations.zh-Hans: 把你鞋子上的泥土擦掉。
translations.pt: Tire a terra dos seus sapatos.
translations.vi: Hãy giũ đất khỏi giày của bạn.
translations.nl: Haal de modder van je schoenen.
translations.hu: Takarítsd le a sarat a cipődről.
translations.el: Βγάλε το χώμα από τα παπούτσια σου.
translations.sv: Ta bort smutsen från dina skor.
translations.ro: Dă pământul de pe pantofii tăi.
translations.ja: 靴についた泥を落として。

tokens.explanation: Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; in context, used as an imperative-like form.
Definite article, feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of "quita".
Preposition introducing the complement "tus zapatos".
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition "de".
